normalized.summary: The NSRC is Malaysia's national response centre that helps victims of online financial scams by coordinating with banks, law enforcement, and government agencies to respond quickly.
normalized.title: What is the National Scam Response Centre (NSRC)?

original.notes: FAQ can be indexed for RAG after source review.
original.summary_en: The NSRC is Malaysia's national response centre that helps victims of online financial scams by coordinating with banks, law enforcement, and government agencies to respond quickly.
original.summary_ms: NSRC ialah pusat tindak balas kebangsaan Malaysia yang membantu mangsa penipuan kewangan dalam talian dengan menyelaraskan tindakan bersama bank, pihak berkuasa dan agensi kerajaan.
original.summary_zh: 国家诈骗应对中心（NSRC）是马来西亚的全国诈骗应对机构，负责协调银行、执法机构和政府部门，为网络金融诈骗受害者提供快速协助。
original.title_en: What is the National Scam Response Centre (NSRC)?
original.title_ms: Apakah itu Pusat Respons Penipuan Kebangsaan (NSRC)?
original.title_zh: 什么是国家诈骗应对中心（NSRC）？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

workbookGovernance.workbookApprovalNotes: FAQ can be indexed for RAG after source review.

normalized.summary: Anyone who believes they have become a victim of an online financial scam, such as phishing, malware, or unauthorized bank transfers, should contact their bank or NSRC immediately.
normalized.title: Who should contact NSRC?

original.summary_en: Anyone who believes they have become a victim of an online financial scam, such as phishing, malware, or unauthorized bank transfers, should contact their bank or NSRC immediately.
original.summary_ms: Sesiapa yang percaya mereka menjadi mangsa penipuan kewangan dalam talian seperti phishing, perisian hasad atau pemindahan wang tanpa kebenaran perlu segera menghubungi bank atau NSRC.
original.summary_zh: 任何怀疑自己遭遇网络金融诈骗（如网络钓鱼、恶意软件或未经授权的银行转账）的人，都应立即联系银行或 NSRC。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Contact your bank or NSRC (997) immediately, then make a police report. Acting quickly may help reduce financial losses and improve the chances of recovering your money.
normalized.title: What should I do if I have been scammed?

original.summary_en: Contact your bank or NSRC (997) immediately, then make a police report. Acting quickly may help reduce financial losses and improve the chances of recovering your money.
original.summary_ms: Hubungi bank anda atau NSRC (997) dengan segera, kemudian buat laporan polis. Bertindak pantas boleh membantu mengurangkan kerugian dan meningkatkan peluang mendapatkan semula wang anda.
original.summary_zh: 请立即联系您的银行或拨打 NSRC（997），然后向警方报案。尽快采取行动有助于减少损失，并提高追回资金的机会。
original.title_en: What should I do if I have been scammed?
original.title_ms: Apakah yang perlu saya lakukan jika saya menjadi mangsa penipuan?
original.title_zh: 如果我被骗了，我应该怎么办？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Prepare details such as your personal information, bank account details, transaction records, and any evidence related to the scam to help the authorities investigate more effectively.
normalized.title: What information should I prepare when reporting a scam?

original.summary_en: Prepare details such as your personal information, bank account details, transaction records, and any evidence related to the scam to help the authorities investigate more effectively.
original.summary_ms: Sediakan maklumat seperti butiran peribadi, maklumat akaun bank, rekod transaksi dan bukti berkaitan penipuan untuk membantu siasatan dijalankan dengan lebih berkesan.
original.summary_zh: 举报诈骗时，请准备好个人资料、银行账户信息、交易记录以及相关证据，以协助有关当局更有效地展开调查。
original.title_en: What information should I prepare when reporting a scam?
original.title_ms: Maklumat apakah yang perlu disediakan semasa membuat laporan penipuan?
original.title_zh: 举报诈骗时需要准备哪些资料？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Fake news is false or misleading information that is presented as real news and may spread quickly online.
normalized.title: What is fake news?

original.summary_en: Fake news is false or misleading information that is presented as real news and may spread quickly online.
original.summary_ms: Berita palsu ialah maklumat yang tidak benar atau mengelirukan tetapi disebarkan seolah-olah berita sebenar.
original.summary_zh: 假新闻是指以真实新闻形式传播的虚假或误导性信息。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Verify the information using trusted news sources or official fact-checking websites before sharing it.
normalized.title: How can I check if information is true?

original.summary_en: Verify the information using trusted news sources or official fact-checking websites before sharing it.
original.summary_ms: Semak maklumat menggunakan sumber berita yang dipercayai atau laman semakan fakta rasmi sebelum berkongsi.
original.summary_zh: 在分享之前，请使用可信的新闻来源或官方事实查证网站验证信息。
original.title_en: How can I check if information is true?
original.title_ms: Bagaimanakah saya boleh menyemak sama ada sesuatu maklumat itu benar?
original.title_zh: 我如何确认信息是否属实？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: People may share fake news because they believe it is true, react emotionally, or do not verify the information first.
normalized.title: Why do people share fake news?

original.summary_en: People may share fake news because they believe it is true, react emotionally, or do not verify the information first.
original.summary_ms: Orang mungkin berkongsi berita palsu kerana mempercayainya, bertindak mengikut emosi atau tidak menyemak maklumat terlebih dahulu.
original.summary_zh: 人们可能因为相信内容、情绪反应，或没有先查证信息而传播假新闻。
original.title_en: Why do people share fake news?
original.title_zh: 为什么人们会传播假新闻？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Avoid sharing it, verify the claim using trusted sources, and report the misleading content if possible.
normalized.title: What should I do if I see fake news?

original.summary_en: Avoid sharing it, verify the claim using trusted sources, and report the misleading content if possible.
original.summary_ms: Jangan kongsikan berita tersebut. Semak kesahihannya menggunakan sumber yang dipercayai dan laporkan kandungan yang mengelirukan jika boleh.
original.summary_zh: 不要传播该内容，应通过可信来源核实，并在可能的情况下举报虚假信息。
original.title_en: What should I do if I see fake news?
original.title_ms: Apakah yang perlu saya lakukan jika saya melihat berita palsu?
original.title_zh: 如果我看到假新闻应该怎么办？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: AI-generated content is text, images, videos, or audio created using artificial intelligence. It can be useful but may also be misleading if used dishonestly.
normalized.title: What is AI-generated content?

original.summary_en: AI-generated content is text, images, videos, or audio created using artificial intelligence. It can be useful but may also be misleading if used dishonestly.
original.summary_ms: Kandungan dijana AI ialah teks, imej, video atau audio yang dihasilkan menggunakan kecerdasan buatan. Ia boleh memberi manfaat tetapi juga boleh mengelirukan jika disalahgunakan.
original.summary_zh: AI 生成内容是利用人工智能创建的文字、图片、视频或音频。它有许多用途，但如果被滥用，也可能误导他人。
original.title_zh: 什么是 AI 生成内容？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: A deepfake is AI-generated or AI-edited media that makes a person appear to say or do something they never actually did.
normalized.title: What is a deepfake?

original.summary_en: A deepfake is AI-generated or AI-edited media that makes a person appear to say or do something they never actually did.
original.summary_ms: Deepfake ialah media yang dijana atau diubah suai menggunakan AI sehingga seseorang kelihatan berkata atau melakukan sesuatu yang sebenarnya tidak berlaku.
original.summary_zh: 深度伪造是利用 AI 生成或修改的媒体内容，使一个人看起来像是在说或做从未发生过的事情。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Look for unusual details, verify the source, and compare the information with trusted sources before believing or sharing it.
normalized.title: How can I tell if content is AI-generated?

original.summary_en: Look for unusual details, verify the source, and compare the information with trusted sources before believing or sharing it.
original.summary_ms: Perhatikan butiran yang luar biasa, semak sumber asal dan bandingkan maklumat dengan sumber yang dipercayai sebelum mempercayai atau berkongsinya.
original.summary_zh: 留意异常细节，核实原始来源，并与可信来源进行比对后再相信或分享内容。
original.title_en: How can I tell if content is AI-generated?
original.title_ms: Bagaimanakah saya boleh mengenal pasti kandungan dijana AI?
original.title_zh: 我如何判断内容是否由 AI 生成？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Some AI-generated content can spread misinformation or scams. Verifying information helps you make informed decisions and prevents the spread of false content.
normalized.title: Why should I verify AI-generated content?

original.summary_en: Some AI-generated content can spread misinformation or scams. Verifying information helps you make informed decisions and prevents the spread of false content.
original.summary_ms: Sesetengah kandungan dijana AI boleh menyebarkan maklumat palsu atau penipuan. Menyemak maklumat membantu anda membuat keputusan yang lebih baik dan mengelakkan penyebaran maklumat palsu.
original.summary_zh: 部分 AI 生成内容可能传播错误信息或诈骗。验证信息有助于做出正确判断，并避免传播虚假内容。
original.title_en: Why should I verify AI-generated content?
original.title_ms: Mengapakah saya perlu menyemak kandungan dijana AI?
original.title_zh: 为什么需要验证 AI 生成内容？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Personal data is information that can identify you, such as your name, phone number, address, email, or identification number.
normalized.title: What is personal data?

original.summary_en: Personal data is information that can identify you, such as your name, phone number, address, email, or identification number.
original.summary_ms: Data peribadi ialah maklumat yang boleh mengenal pasti anda seperti nama, nombor telefon, alamat, e-mel atau nombor pengenalan.
original.summary_zh: 个人数据是能够识别您身份的信息，例如姓名、电话号码、地址、电子邮件或身份证号码。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Public Wi-Fi networks may not be secure. Attackers could intercept your information if you access sensitive accounts without protection.
normalized.title: Why should I be careful when using public Wi-Fi?

original.summary_en: Public Wi-Fi networks may not be secure. Attackers could intercept your information if you access sensitive accounts without protection.
original.summary_ms: Rangkaian Wi-Fi awam mungkin tidak selamat. Penyerang boleh mencuri maklumat anda jika anda mengakses akaun penting tanpa perlindungan.
original.summary_zh: 公共 Wi-Fi 网络可能不安全。如果没有采取保护措施，攻击者可能窃取您的信息。
original.title_en: Why should I be careful when using public Wi-Fi?
original.title_ms: Mengapa saya perlu berhati-hati apabila menggunakan Wi-Fi awam?
original.title_zh: 为什么使用公共 Wi-Fi 时要小心？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Your digital footprint is the information you leave behind when using websites, apps, and social media. It can affect your privacy and online reputation.
normalized.title: What is a digital footprint?

original.summary_en: Your digital footprint is the information you leave behind when using websites, apps, and social media. It can affect your privacy and online reputation.
original.summary_ms: Jejak digital ialah maklumat yang anda tinggalkan semasa menggunakan laman web, aplikasi dan media sosial. Ia boleh mempengaruhi privasi dan reputasi anda.
original.summary_zh: 数字足迹是您在使用网站、应用程序和社交媒体时留下的信息，它会影响您的隐私和网络形象。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Use strong passwords, enable multi-factor authentication, review app permissions, and only share personal information with trusted websites and services.
normalized.title: How can I protect my privacy online?

original.summary_en: Use strong passwords, enable multi-factor authentication, review app permissions, and only share personal information with trusted websites and services.
original.summary_ms: Gunakan kata laluan yang kukuh, aktifkan pengesahan berbilang faktor, semak kebenaran aplikasi dan hanya kongsi maklumat peribadi dengan laman web yang dipercayai.
original.summary_zh: 使用强密码、启用多重身份验证、检查应用权限，并只向可信的网站和服务提供个人信息。
original.title_en: How can I protect my privacy online?
original.title_ms: Bagaimanakah saya boleh melindungi privasi saya dalam talian?
original.title_zh: 我如何保护自己的网络隐私？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Cyberbullying is bullying that happens through digital devices such as social media, messaging apps, online games, or websites.
normalized.title: What is cyberbullying?

original.summary_en: Cyberbullying is bullying that happens through digital devices such as social media, messaging apps, online games, or websites.
original.summary_ms: Buli siber ialah perbuatan membuli menggunakan media digital seperti media sosial, aplikasi mesej, permainan dalam talian atau laman web.
original.summary_zh: 网络霸凌是指通过社交媒体、聊天应用、网络游戏或网站等数字平台进行的霸凌行为。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Online grooming is when someone builds trust with a young person online to manipulate or exploit them.
normalized.title: What is online grooming?

original.summary_en: Online grooming is when someone builds trust with a young person online to manipulate or exploit them.
original.summary_ms: Grooming dalam talian ialah apabila seseorang membina kepercayaan dengan remaja melalui internet untuk memanipulasi atau mengeksploitasi mereka.
original.summary_zh: 网络诱骗是指有人通过互联网与青少年建立信任关系，以便操控或剥削他们。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Sextortion is a form of online blackmail where someone threatens to share private images or videos unless demands are met.
normalized.title: What is sextortion?

original.summary_en: Sextortion is a form of online blackmail where someone threatens to share private images or videos unless demands are met.
original.summary_ms: Sextortion ialah ugutan dalam talian yang menggunakan gambar atau video peribadi untuk memaksa seseorang memenuhi tuntutan tertentu.
original.summary_zh: 网络性勒索是指利用私人照片或视频进行威胁，逼迫受害者满足要求。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Protect your personal information, use privacy settings, avoid chatting with strangers, and tell a trusted adult if something makes you feel unsafe online.
normalized.title: How can I stay safe online?

original.summary_en: Protect your personal information, use privacy settings, avoid chatting with strangers, and tell a trusted adult if something makes you feel unsafe online.
original.summary_ms: Lindungi maklumat peribadi, gunakan tetapan privasi, elakkan berbual dengan orang yang tidak dikenali dan beritahu orang dewasa yang dipercayai jika sesuatu membuat anda berasa tidak selamat.
original.summary_zh: 保护个人信息、使用隐私设置、避免与陌生人聊天，如果网上发生让你感到不安全的事情，请告诉值得信赖的成年人。
original.title_en: How can I stay safe online?
original.title_ms: Bagaimanakah saya boleh kekal selamat dalam talian?

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: A strong password is long, unique, and difficult for others to guess. It should not contain personal information or common words.
normalized.title: What makes a strong password?

original.summary_en: A strong password is long, unique, and difficult for others to guess. It should not contain personal information or common words.
original.summary_ms: Kata laluan yang kukuh mestilah panjang, unik dan sukar diteka. Elakkan menggunakan maklumat peribadi atau perkataan biasa.
original.summary_zh: 强密码应足够长、独特且难以猜测，不应包含个人信息或常见词汇。
original.title_ms: Apakah ciri-ciri kata laluan yang kukuh?

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: If one password is stolen, using different passwords prevents attackers from accessing your other accounts.
normalized.title: Why should I use different passwords for different accounts?

original.summary_en: If one password is stolen, using different passwords prevents attackers from accessing your other accounts.
original.summary_ms: Jika satu kata laluan dicuri, penggunaan kata laluan berbeza akan menghalang penyerang daripada mengakses akaun anda yang lain.
original.summary_zh: 如果一个密码泄露，使用不同密码可以防止攻击者访问您的其他账户。
original.title_en: Why should I use different passwords for different accounts?
original.title_ms: Mengapa saya perlu menggunakan kata laluan yang berbeza bagi setiap akaun?
original.title_zh: 为什么每个账户都要使用不同的密码？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: MFA adds an extra verification step, such as a code sent to your phone, making it much harder for attackers to access your account.
normalized.title: What is multi-factor authentication (MFA)?

original.summary_en: MFA adds an extra verification step, such as a code sent to your phone, making it much harder for attackers to access your account.
original.summary_ms: MFA menambah satu langkah pengesahan tambahan seperti kod yang dihantar ke telefon anda, menjadikan akaun lebih sukar diceroboh.
original.summary_zh: 多重身份验证会增加额外的验证步骤，例如发送到手机的验证码，从而提高账户安全性。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: A password manager helps you create, store, and manage strong passwords securely without having to remember them all.
normalized.title: Should I use a password manager?

original.summary_en: A password manager helps you create, store, and manage strong passwords securely without having to remember them all.
original.summary_ms: Pengurus kata laluan membantu anda mencipta, menyimpan dan mengurus kata laluan yang kukuh dengan selamat tanpa perlu mengingatinya satu persatu.
original.summary_zh: 密码管理器可以帮助您安全地创建、保存和管理强密码，而无需记住每一个密码。
original.title_en: Should I use a password manager?
original.title_ms: Perlukah saya menggunakan pengurus kata laluan?
original.title_zh: 我应该使用密码管理器吗？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: A digital citizen is someone who uses technology responsibly, respectfully and safely while interacting online.
normalized.title: What is a digital citizen?

original.summary_en: A digital citizen is someone who uses technology responsibly, respectfully and safely while interacting online.
original.summary_ms: Warganegara digital ialah seseorang yang menggunakan teknologi secara bertanggungjawab, berhemah dan selamat ketika berada dalam talian.
original.summary_zh: 数字公民是指能够负责任、尊重他人并安全使用科技的人。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Social engineering is when attackers manipulate people into revealing sensitive information or performing unsafe actions.
normalized.title: What is social engineering?

original.summary_en: Social engineering is when attackers manipulate people into revealing sensitive information or performing unsafe actions.
original.summary_ms: Kejuruteraan sosial ialah apabila penyerang memanipulasi seseorang supaya mendedahkan maklumat sensitif atau melakukan tindakan yang tidak selamat.
original.summary_zh: 社会工程攻击是指攻击者通过欺骗或操纵他人来获取敏感信息或诱导他们采取不安全的行为。

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: Some links or attachments may lead to scams, malware, or fake websites. Always check before clicking.
normalized.title: Why should I think before clicking?

original.summary_en: Some links or attachments may lead to scams, malware, or fake websites. Always check before clicking.
original.summary_ms: Sesetengah pautan atau lampiran mungkin membawa kepada penipuan, perisian hasad atau laman web palsu. Sentiasa semak sebelum mengklik.
original.summary_zh: 某些链接或附件可能会带来诈骗、恶意软件或虚假网站。点击前请先确认。
original.title_en: Why should I think before clicking?
original.title_ms: Mengapa saya perlu berfikir sebelum mengklik?
original.title_zh: 为什么点击链接前要先思考？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

normalized.summary: If something online seems suspicious or makes you uncomfortable, ask a trusted adult, teacher or parent before taking action.
normalized.title: Who should I ask if I'm unsure about something online?

original.summary_en: If something online seems suspicious or makes you uncomfortable, ask a trusted adult, teacher or parent before taking action.
original.summary_ms: Jika sesuatu dalam talian kelihatan mencurigakan atau membuat anda tidak selesa, rujuk kepada ibu bapa, guru atau orang dewasa yang dipercayai sebelum bertindak.
original.summary_zh: 如果网络上的事情让你感到可疑或不舒服，请先向家长、老师或值得信赖的成年人寻求帮助。
original.title_en: Who should I ask if I'm unsure about something online?
original.title_ms: Siapakah yang patut saya rujuk jika saya tidak pasti tentang sesuatu dalam talian?
original.title_zh: 如果我不确定网络上的事情，我应该向谁求助？

issues.message: FAQ answer is missing.

original.summary_zh: 学习如何使用马来西亚官方事实查证平台验证网络流传的新闻、社交媒体内容及各种网络消息。

normalized.summary: Learn how to evaluate online information, identify misinformation, and think critically before sharing content.
normalized.title: Media and Information Literacy

original.summary_en: Learn how to evaluate online information, identify misinformation, and think critically before sharing content.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari cara menilai maklumat dalam talian, mengenal pasti maklumat palsu dan berfikir secara kritikal sebelum berkongsi kandungan.
original.summary_zh: 学习如何评估网络信息、识别错误信息，并在分享内容前进行批判性思考。

normalized.summary: Learn how artificial intelligence is used in phishing, fraud, and cybercrime, and why it is important to verify digital content before trusting it.
normalized.title: AI in Cybercrime: Understanding AI-Enabled Threats

original.summary_en: Learn how artificial intelligence is used in phishing, fraud, and cybercrime, and why it is important to verify digital content before trusting it.
original.summary_ms: Ketahui bagaimana kecerdasan buatan digunakan dalam phishing, penipuan dan jenayah siber serta mengapa penting untuk menyemak kandungan digital sebelum mempercayainya.
original.summary_zh: 了解人工智能如何被用于网络钓鱼、诈骗和网络犯罪，以及为什么在相信数字内容前必须先进行验证。
original.title_en: AI in Cybercrime: Understanding AI-Enabled Threats
original.title_ms: AI dalam Jenayah Siber: Memahami Ancaman Berasaskan AI
original.title_zh: AI 在网络犯罪中的应用：了解 AI 威胁

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn what deepfakes are, how they are used in cybercrime, and ways to identify manipulated videos, images, and audio.
normalized.title: Understanding Deepfakes and Synthetic Media

original.summary_en: Learn what deepfakes are, how they are used in cybercrime, and ways to identify manipulated videos, images, and audio.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari apakah itu deepfake, bagaimana ia digunakan dalam jenayah siber dan cara mengenal pasti video, imej serta audio yang telah dimanipulasi.
original.summary_zh: 学习什么是深度伪造（Deepfake）、它如何被用于网络犯罪，以及如何识别被篡改的视频、图片和音频。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn about personal data protection, privacy rights, and how personal information should be handled under Malaysia's data protection framework.
normalized.title: Department of Personal Data Protection (JPDP)

original.source_organisation: Department of Personal Data Protection (JPDP), Malaysia
original.summary_en: Learn about personal data protection, privacy rights, and how personal information should be handled under Malaysia's data protection framework.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari tentang perlindungan data peribadi, hak privasi dan cara maklumat peribadi harus dikendalikan di bawah rangka kerja perlindungan data Malaysia.
original.summary_zh: 学习马来西亚个人数据保护框架下的个人数据保护、隐私权以及个人信息应如何处理。
original.title_zh: 马来西亚个人数据保护局（JPDP）

normalized.summary: Learn practical ways to protect your online accounts, personal information, devices, and privacy while browsing the internet.
normalized.title: Online Privacy and Security

original.summary_en: Learn practical ways to protect your online accounts, personal information, devices, and privacy while browsing the internet.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari cara melindungi akaun dalam talian, maklumat peribadi, peranti dan privasi semasa melayari internet.
original.summary_zh: 学习如何在上网时保护您的在线账户、个人信息、设备和隐私。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn what cyberbullying is, how to recognise it, how it affects people, and what you can do if it happens to you or someone else.
normalized.title: Cyberbullying: What Is It and How to Stop It

original.summary_en: Learn what cyberbullying is, how to recognise it, how it affects people, and what you can do if it happens to you or someone else.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari apakah itu buli siber, cara mengenal pastinya, kesannya terhadap mangsa dan tindakan yang boleh diambil jika ia berlaku kepada anda atau orang lain.
original.summary_zh: 学习什么是网络霸凌、如何识别它、它对他人的影响，以及当自己或他人遭遇网络霸凌时应该如何应对。
original.title_en: Cyberbullying: What Is It and How to Stop It
original.title_ms: Buli Siber: Apakah Itu dan Cara Menghentikannya
original.title_zh: 网络霸凌：什么是网络霸凌以及如何应对

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn how to stay safe online by recognising online risks, protecting your privacy, interacting safely with others, and responding appropriately to harmful situations.
normalized.title: Online Safety

original.summary_en: Learn how to stay safe online by recognising online risks, protecting your privacy, interacting safely with others, and responding appropriately to harmful situations.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari cara kekal selamat dalam talian dengan mengenal pasti risiko, melindungi privasi, berinteraksi dengan selamat dan bertindak dengan betul apabila menghadapi situasi berbahaya.
original.summary_zh: 学习如何识别网络风险、保护个人隐私、安全地与他人互动，并在遇到危险情况时采取正确行动。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn how to create strong, unique passwords and why using different passwords for different accounts helps keep your information safe.
normalized.title: Use Strong Passwords

original.summary_en: Learn how to create strong, unique passwords and why using different passwords for different accounts helps keep your information safe.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari cara mencipta kata laluan yang kukuh dan unik serta mengapa menggunakan kata laluan berbeza bagi setiap akaun membantu melindungi maklumat anda.
original.summary_zh: 学习如何创建强大且唯一的密码，以及为什么为不同账户使用不同密码可以更好地保护您的信息。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn how multi-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security and helps protect your online accounts even if your password is stolen.
normalized.title: Turn On Multi-Factor Authentication

original.summary_en: Learn how multi-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security and helps protect your online accounts even if your password is stolen.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari bagaimana pengesahan pelbagai faktor menambah lapisan keselamatan tambahan dan membantu melindungi akaun anda walaupun kata laluan dicuri.
original.summary_zh: 学习多重身份验证如何增加额外的安全保护，即使密码泄露也能帮助保护您的账户。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn how to use technology responsibly, communicate respectfully online, and make safe and informed decisions in the digital world.
normalized.title: Digital Citizenship

original.summary_en: Learn how to use technology responsibly, communicate respectfully online, and make safe and informed decisions in the digital world.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari cara menggunakan teknologi secara bertanggungjawab, berkomunikasi dengan hormat dalam talian dan membuat keputusan yang selamat dalam dunia digital.
original.summary_zh: 学习如何负责任地使用科技、文明上网，并在数字世界中做出安全且明智的决定。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn what social engineering is, how attackers manipulate people, and simple ways to recognise and avoid common tricks.
normalized.title: Social Engineering Explained

original.summary_en: Learn what social engineering is, how attackers manipulate people, and simple ways to recognise and avoid common tricks.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari apakah itu kejuruteraan sosial, bagaimana penyerang memanipulasi manusia dan cara mengenal pasti serta mengelakkan helah yang biasa digunakan.
original.summary_zh: 学习什么是社会工程攻击、攻击者如何操纵他人，以及如何识别和避免常见骗局。

issues.message: Workbook does not include Resource body/content text.

normalized.summary: Learn simple habits to recognise scams, protect your personal information, and respond safely if you suspect fraudulent activity.
normalized.title: How to Avoid a Scam

original.summary_en: Learn simple habits to recognise scams, protect your personal information, and respond safely if you suspect fraudulent activity.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari langkah mudah untuk mengenal pasti penipuan, melindungi maklumat peribadi dan bertindak dengan selamat jika mengesyaki aktiviti penipuan.
original.summary_zh: 学习简单的方法来识别诈骗、保护个人资料，并在怀疑遇到诈骗时采取安全行动。

normalized.summary: Learn simple steps to verify online information, identify fake news, and share information responsibly.
normalized.title: Think Before You Share

original.summary_en: Learn simple steps to verify online information, identify fake news, and share information responsibly.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari langkah mudah untuk menyemak maklumat dalam talian, mengenal pasti berita palsu dan berkongsi maklumat secara bertanggungjawab.
original.summary_zh: 学习简单的方法来验证网络信息、识别假新闻，并负责任地分享内容。

normalized.summary: Learn simple habits to safely use AI tools, verify AI-generated content, protect your personal information, and think critically before trusting or sharing online content.
normalized.title: Using AI Safely Online

original.summary_en: Learn simple habits to safely use AI tools, verify AI-generated content, protect your personal information, and think critically before trusting or sharing online content.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari amalan mudah untuk menggunakan AI dengan selamat, menyemak kandungan yang dijana AI, melindungi maklumat peribadi dan berfikir secara kritikal sebelum mempercayai atau berkongsi kandungan dalam talian.
original.summary_zh: 学习安全使用 AI 工具的方法、验证 AI 生成内容、保护个人信息，并在相信或分享网络内容前进行判断。
original.title_ms: Menggunakan AI Dengan Selamat Dalam Talian

normalized.summary: Learn simple habits to protect your personal information, manage privacy settings, use secure connections, and think carefully before sharing information online.
normalized.title: Protecting Your Personal Information

original.summary_en: Learn simple habits to protect your personal information, manage privacy settings, use secure connections, and think carefully before sharing information online.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari amalan mudah untuk melindungi maklumat peribadi, mengurus tetapan privasi, menggunakan sambungan yang selamat dan berfikir sebelum berkongsi maklumat dalam talian.
original.summary_zh: 学习简单的方法来保护个人信息、管理隐私设置、使用安全连接，并在网上分享信息前三思。

normalized.summary: Learn simple habits to protect yourself online, communicate respectfully, recognise unsafe behaviour, and seek help from trusted adults when needed.
normalized.title: Staying Safe Online

original.source_organisation: National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NetSmartz)
original.summary_en: Learn simple habits to protect yourself online, communicate respectfully, recognise unsafe behaviour, and seek help from trusted adults when needed.
original.summary_ms: Pelajari amalan mudah untuk melindungi diri dalam talian, berkomunikasi dengan hormat, mengenal pasti tingkah laku yang tidak selamat dan mendapatkan bantuan daripada orang dewasa yang dipercayai apabila diperlukan.
original.summary_zh: 学习简单的方法来保护自己、文明上网、识别危险行为，并在需要时向值得信赖的成年人寻求帮助。

sourceMetadata.sourceLabel: National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NetSmartz)
sourceMetadata.sourceOrganisation: National Center for Missing & Exploited Children (NetSmartz)

normalized.summary: Build strong passwords, never reuse them across different accounts, enable multi-factor authentication, and never share your passwords or verification codes with anyone.
normalized.title: Protect Your Accounts

original.summary_en: Build strong passwords, never reuse them across different accounts, enable multi-factor authentication, and never share your passwords or verification codes with anyone.
original.summary_ms: Gunakan kata laluan yang kukuh, jangan gunakan semula kata laluan yang sama, aktifkan pengesahan pelbagai faktor dan jangan sekali-kali berkongsi kata laluan atau kod pengesahan anda.
original.summary_zh: 使用强密码、不要重复使用密码、启用多重身份验证，并且绝不要与他人分享密码或验证码。

normalized.summary: Develop good online habits by protecting your personal information, thinking before clicking, treating others with respect, and asking for help when something feels wrong.
normalized.title: Safe Digital Habits

original.summary_en: Develop good online habits by protecting your personal information, thinking before clicking, treating others with respect, and asking for help when something feels wrong.
original.summary_ms: Amalkan tabiat digital yang baik dengan melindungi maklumat peribadi, berfikir sebelum mengklik, menghormati orang lain dan meminta bantuan apabila sesuatu kelihatan tidak betul.
original.summary_zh: 养成良好的数字习惯，包括保护个人信息、点击前三思、尊重他人，并在遇到可疑情况时主动寻求帮助。

normalized.summary: Experience realistic scam situations involving phishing emails, fake messages, phone scams, and malicious links. Learn how to identify warning signs and choose the safest response.
normalized.title: Avoiding Social Engineering and Phishing Attacks

original.notes: Scenario can link to RES-PH-001 as practice_after.
original.summary_en: Experience realistic scam situations involving phishing emails, fake messages, phone scams, and malicious links. Learn how to identify warning signs and choose the safest response.
original.summary_ms: Alami situasi penipuan yang realistik melibatkan e-mel phishing, mesej palsu, panggilan telefon penipuan dan pautan berniat jahat. Pelajari cara mengenal pasti tanda amaran dan memilih tindakan yang paling selamat.
original.summary_zh: 体验真实的诈骗情境，包括网络钓鱼邮件、虚假短信、电话诈骗和恶意链接。学习识别危险信号，并选择最安全的应对方式。
original.title_en: Avoiding Social Engineering and Phishing Attacks
original.title_ms: Mengelakkan Kejuruteraan Sosial dan Serangan Phishing
original.title_zh: 避免社会工程与网络钓鱼攻击

normalized.summary: Practice identifying whether a viral social media post is true by checking reliable sources before sharing it with others.
normalized.title: Verifying Viral News Before Sharing

original.summary_en: Practice identifying whether a viral social media post is true by checking reliable sources before sharing it with others.
original.summary_ms: Latih diri mengenal pasti sama ada sesuatu berita tular adalah benar dengan menyemak sumber yang dipercayai sebelum berkongsi.
original.summary_zh: 学习在分享网络热门消息前，通过可靠来源验证其真实性。
original.title_zh: 分享前验证网络流传新闻

normalized.summary: Explore realistic situations involving AI-generated images and videos. Learn how to identify warning signs, question suspicious media, and verify information before believing or sharing it.
normalized.title: Uncovering Deepfakes

original.summary_en: Explore realistic situations involving AI-generated images and videos. Learn how to identify warning signs, question suspicious media, and verify information before believing or sharing it.
original.summary_ms: Terokai situasi yang melibatkan imej dan video yang dijana AI. Pelajari cara mengenal pasti tanda amaran, mempersoalkan kandungan yang mencurigakan dan menyemak maklumat sebelum mempercayai atau berkongsinya.
original.summary_zh: 通过真实情境学习识别 AI 生成的图片和视频，观察可疑迹象，并在相信或分享之前验证信息。

normalized.summary: You're at a café and need to access your online banking. Decide whether it's safe to use the public Wi-Fi and identify the best steps to protect your personal information before connecting.
normalized.title: Public Computers and Public Wi-Fi

original.summary_en: You're at a café and need to access your online banking. Decide whether it's safe to use the public Wi-Fi and identify the best steps to protect your personal information before connecting.
original.summary_ms: Anda berada di sebuah kafe dan perlu mengakses perbankan dalam talian. Tentukan sama ada selamat menggunakan Wi-Fi awam dan kenal pasti langkah terbaik untuk melindungi maklumat peribadi sebelum menyambung.
original.summary_zh: 你在咖啡馆需要登录网上银行。判断是否适合使用公共 Wi-Fi，并选择保护个人信息的最佳做法。

normalized.summary: A student receives repeated hurtful messages in a group chat and must decide how to respond safely, support themselves, and report the behaviour appropriately.
normalized.title: Dealing with Online Bullying

original.summary_en: A student receives repeated hurtful messages in a group chat and must decide how to respond safely, support themselves, and report the behaviour appropriately.
original.summary_ms: Seorang pelajar menerima mesej yang menyakitkan hati secara berulang dalam kumpulan sembang dan perlu menentukan cara bertindak balas dengan selamat, melindungi diri serta membuat laporan yang sesuai.
original.summary_zh: 一名学生在群聊中不断收到伤人的信息，需要决定如何安全应对、保护自己并举报相关行为。

normalized.summary: You're creating a new online account. Choose the strongest password and decide whether to enable multi-factor authentication to better protect your account.
normalized.title: Creating a Secure Password

original.summary_en: You're creating a new online account. Choose the strongest password and decide whether to enable multi-factor authentication to better protect your account.
original.summary_ms: Anda sedang mencipta akaun dalam talian baharu. Pilih kata laluan yang paling kukuh dan tentukan sama ada perlu mengaktifkan pengesahan pelbagai faktor untuk melindungi akaun anda.
original.summary_zh: 你正在注册一个新的在线账户。请选择最安全的密码，并决定是否启用多重身份验证来保护账户。

normalized.summary: You receive a message from someone claiming to be from your school asking for your login details. Decide what you should do before responding.
normalized.title: A Stranger Asks for Your Information

original.summary_en: You receive a message from someone claiming to be from your school asking for your login details. Decide what you should do before responding.
original.summary_ms: Anda menerima mesej daripada seseorang yang mendakwa berasal dari sekolah anda dan meminta maklumat log masuk. Tentukan tindakan yang perlu diambil sebelum membalas.
original.summary_zh: 你收到一条自称来自学校的信息，要求提供登录资料。请判断在回复之前应该采取什么行动。
original.title_en: A Stranger Asks for Your Information
original.title_zh: 陌生人向你索取个人信息
